parameters.query: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url FROM public.global_settings WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url';

SELECT id, name, refund_for, membership, reason, amount, refund, status, 
       request_email_message_id, bank_details_message_id, treasury_email_message_id,
       paid_at, rejected_at, cancelled_at, notes, created_at
FROM public.refunds
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 50;
